features: Clearasil 5 in 1 Multi-Action Cleansing Pads is specially designed to fight 5 pimple problems: 1. Reduces excess oil & shine 2. Unblocks pores. 3. Evens skin tone. 4. Removes dirt. 5. Exfoliates for smoother skin.
✔️ IMPROVES SKIN TEXTURE & TONE: Clearasil 5 in 1 Multi-Action Cleansing Pads calm redness and inflammation for a clearer skin and an even skin tone.

✔️ SALICYLIC ACID & GLYCERIN FOR REFINING PORES - Specially formulated face cleanser ideal for unclogging and keeping pores clear, while helping to control excess sebum and soothing sensitive skin prone to acne, spots or breakouts.
✔️ PREVENT the appearance of new pimple marks and reduce the appearance of blackheads.
✔️ DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED - Suitable for all skin types, even sensitive.
description: Product Description Clearasil Multi-Action Pads have a specially designed formula to fight 5 pimple problems in one 1. Reduces excess oil and shine 2. Unblocks pores 3. Evens skin tone 4. Removes dirt 5. Exfoliates for smoother skin Ingredients Aqua, Alcohol Denat, Salicylic Acid, Isoceteth-20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Sodium Hydroxide, Triethanolamine, Allantoin, Parfum, Menthol, Benzyl Salicylate, Disodium EDTA, Limonene, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid Directions [IN] Wipe face with the pad after cleansing, possibly repeating as needed. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets into eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use on damaged or broken skin. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away. Box Contains 1 x Clearasil Multi Action 5 in 1 Cleansing Pads 65 Pads Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser, Dansom Lane, Hull, HU8 7DS, UK. See more
